name: submission-gate
description: Headlessly scan signed submission mail, validate one frozen machine block, and execute the authoritative submission gate through the locked product-release-gate core.

interface.longDescription: Use one credential-free configuration and one controller across MCP, Skill, standalone CLI, and unattended OS scheduling. The gate scans `【提测】` mail idempotently, validates the HMAC machine block, and fails closed on missing evidence or missing integrations.
defaultPrompt: Run submission gate setup with zero manual JSON editing.
Scan the gate mailbox once and process new `【提测】` mail.
Show blocked, passed, and skipped counts.
Diagnose dependency lock, mailbox access, and authoritative gate readiness.
